templates: Acknowledged. Thanks for sending this over.

calendar_accept.template: Thanks for the invite! I'll be there.
calendar_accept.with_conflict: I have a scheduling conflict during that time. Let me check if I can move things around and get back to you.

calendar_decline.template: Thanks for the invite, but I won't be able to make it. Could you share any notes/recording afterward?
calendar_decline.with_conflict: Unfortunately I have a conflict at that time ({conflict_event}). Would any of these alternative times work? {alternatives}

calendar_tentative.template: Thanks for the invite. I'm tentatively available but will confirm closer to the date.

follow_up.template: Thanks for following up. Let me look into this and get back to you shortly.

info_request.template: Thanks for reaching out. I'll review this and respond with the information you need.
